info.title: Direct Canvas LMS API
info.description: Read-only direct Canvas LMS REST API schema for a private Custom GPT using API key Bearer authentication.

get.description: Get the current user's Canvas profile. This also verifies that the Canvas API token can reach Canvas.
List Canvas courses for the current user. The default state filter mirrors the project's active/completed course lookup.

parameters.name: state[]
parameters.description: Canvas course states to include. Omit this parameter only when you intentionally want Canvas defaults.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas course include fields used by the project.

get.description: Get details for one Canvas course. Include syllabus_body when you want the course syllabus.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas course include fields. The project uses syllabus_body for the syllabus helper.

get.description: List assignments for one Canvas course.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas assignment include fields. Add submission to include the current user's submission data.

get.description: Get details for one Canvas assignment.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas assignment include fields. Add submission to include the current user's submission data.

get.description: List assignment groups for one Canvas course.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas assignment group include fields used by the project.

get.description: Get submission details for one assignment. Use user_id self for the current user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Canvas user ID, or use "self" for the current user.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas submission include fields used by the project.

get.description: List files for one Canvas course.
List files in one Canvas folder. This covers the project's folder-backed file listing mode.
Get information about one Canvas file.
List folders for one Canvas course.
List wiki pages for one Canvas course.
Get one Canvas course page by its page URL slug.
List Canvas calendar events.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Canvas calendar event type. The project uses event.

parameters.name: all_events
parameters.description: When true, include all visible events.

get.description: Get upcoming Canvas events. The project filters this response to assignment events; use it for upcoming assignment due dates.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of upcoming events to return.

get.description: Get the current user's Canvas dashboard.
Get Canvas dashboard cards for active courses.
List the current user's Canvas conversations.
Get details for one Canvas conversation.
List the current user's Canvas activity stream notifications.
Get enrollment and grade data for one Canvas course.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas enrollment include fields used for grade lookup.

get.description: List modules for one Canvas course.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas module include fields used by the project.

get.description: Get details for one Canvas module.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas module include fields used by the project.

get.description: List items inside one Canvas module.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas module item include fields used by the project.

get.description: Get details for one Canvas module item.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas module item include fields used by the project.

get.description: List discussion topics for one Canvas course. Set type to announcement to list announcements, matching the project's announcements helper.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional Canvas discussion topic type filter.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas discussion include fields used by the project.

get.description: Get details for one Canvas discussion topic.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Canvas discussion include fields used by the project.

get.description: List quizzes for one Canvas course.
Get details for one Canvas quiz.
List rubrics for one Canvas course.

canvasBearer.description: Paste your Canvas access token into GPT Action API key Bearer authentication.

CanvasData.description: Canvas LMS response data. The shape varies by endpoint and may be an object or array.

CanvasError.description: Canvas LMS error response. Canvas error shapes vary by endpoint and institution.
